name: Magnolia Bancorp, Inc.
summary: PART I General BUSINESS OF MAGNOLIA BANCORP, INC. Magnolia Bancorp, Inc. (Magnolia Bancorp or the Company) was incorporated by Mutual Savings and Loan Association (Mutual Savings or the Association) in May 2024 as part of the conversion of Mutual Savings from the mutual to the stock form of organization (the Conversion). The Conversion was completed on January 14, 2025, at which time the Company acquired all of the issued and outstanding shares of common stock of the Association and the Associat...
